daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are shifting your perspective, Pisces. Trust the intuitive hits coming through—they're pointing you toward something real. Channel that dreamy energy into actual movement today.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you from the sidelines. Whether it's romantic or platonic, there's genuine appreciation brewing. Be open to conversations that feel a little deeper than usual.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are hitting different right now. Don't undersell what you've got—the people around you are picking up on your energy. Small wins today are setting up something bigger.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to slow down a bit. Movement feels good, but so does rest. Listen to what actually energizes you instead of what you think should. That's the real self-care move.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is running hot this week, Pisces. Trust those subtle nudges pulling you toward new experiences. The energy supports authenticity over people-pleasing, so lean into what actually resonates with your soul.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your vibe shift. Whether you're attached or single, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Real connections happen when you stop filtering yourself.
weekly.career: You've got clarity on what you actually want versus what you think you should want. That difference matters. Small moves toward your real goals compound faster than you'd expect.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Movement that feels good beats workouts that feel like punishment. Rest isn't lazy—it's strategic recovery.
